cms.task_text: Písmenu U (60px) [hlp]chybí dolní vodorovný tah[/hlp]. Přidejte forward(40) na správné místo.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
